0.q: Overexpression of MGHOG1 up-regulates HOG pathway-related and regulated genes

1.q: MGHOG1 overexpressing liquid cultures displayed suppressed mycelial growth and ethanol fermentation.

2.q: we focused on MGHOG1, the yeast Hog1 homolog in Phlebia sp. MG-60, a presumably important player in osmoresponse.
